# Implement hierarchical storage locations and stock alerts

## Summary

Implement hierarchical storage locations and dashboard alerts for stock status and offers.

## Why

Users need to know not only what they own, but also where it is stored and when action is required.

## Scope

- model hierarchical storage locations
- assign products and quantities to specific locations
- support aggregated quantities by location subtree
- define low-stock and out-of-stock alert logic
- define how offer alerts are surfaced in the storage dashboard

## Acceptance Criteria

- locations can be modeled in a hierarchy
- products can be assigned to precise storage locations
- quantity views can be aggregated by location subtree
- low-stock and out-of-stock alerts are supported conceptually
- storage dashboard alert requirements are documented clearly
